## RepetitionRule.monthsOfYear property

Month-of-year values for `BYMONTH=` in YEARLY recurrences.

Values must be integers in `[1, 12]` (1 = January, 12 = December). Only valid when `frequency` is `"yearly"`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
monthsOfYear?: number[] | undefined;
```

## Example

`monthsOfYear: [3, 6, 9, 12]` → `BYMONTH=3,6,9,12`
